# kSCPropNetInterfaces

**Global Variable**

The Network key `Interfaces`, whose value is of type `CFArray`, containing elements of type `CFString`.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSCPropNetInterfaces: CFString
```
title: kSCPropNetInterfaces
